### Post by rhyswilson92 on 2013-04-29
Hi

Using Universal Installer and a hard drive to usb cable I installed Ubuntu 12.04 onto the hard drive. I have got to the test desktop but when I try to install onto the hard drive it cant find the hard drive and when I click forward I get this message -
"No root file system is defined. Please correct this from the partitioning menu." - PLEASE HELP

Below are some screenshots.

 Rhys
